creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am importing llvm, clang, compiler-rt, libc++, libunwind, lld, lldb, and openmp 13.0.0 into <https://github.com/DimitryAndric/freebsd-src/tree/llvm-13-update>, which is a fork of <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src>.

Please perform an exp-run against this branch. To retrieve it, use:

git clone -b llvm-13-update https://github.com/DimitryAndric/freebsd-src.git

As of 2021-09-02, this branch contains the equivalent of llvm-project's 13.0.0 rc2, and it has been rebased onto main-n249047-e3bdf3da769a.
